title: Capnorchis cucullaria

More specifically, it is a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cranichideae. The genus Capnorchis is part of the subtribe Cranichidinae, which comprises terrestrial orchids. These plants are often found in shaded, humid environments and are native to certain regions of the Americas. As a result of its unique characteristics and geographical distribution, Capnorchis cucullaria is a distinct and intriguing species within the orchid family.

intro: Capnorchis cucullaria, also known as Chinese club moss or Chinese feather fern, is a type of ancient vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is rich in health benefits, including its potential to treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties.
